text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the middle of summer and camp<n>season has
arrived!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sun blazes over the campsite.<n>Next to it, at the
beach...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Onward, my Opera O<n>opera troupe!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O's commands echo<n>through the air.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am no longer by my lonesome,<n>Trainer. I have
gained capable<n>followers from the members of my
generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They are Ayabe and Doto! These two<n>vanguards
will lead our advance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this camp shall serve as the<n>stage for the
preliminary clash of<n>generations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: See? Lo, over yonder!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
S-Spe, cut that ooout... Stop splashing<n>me with
water.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I don't think so, Grass. Now<n>stand still,
please. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and Special Week,<n>heroes of the
older generation, are<n>here at this same camp.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They are fierce, certainly—powerful<n>foes, most
definitely. But we will not<n>fall!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Ayabe and Doto! Arm<n>yourselves with
buckets of water that<n>we may douse those two till
they're<n>drenched!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm... Ayabe? Doto? Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I don't see them anywhere, which<n>means...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What?! They've withdrawn<n>themselves to the
camping quarters?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though, Doto did mention she felt<n>uncomfortable
in swimming attire...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And Ayabe never responded to my<n>messages. I
assumed she was so<n>adamant about coming that
she<n>wanted to reserve her enthusiasm till<n>we met.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well then... It would appear we're<n>shorthanded.
The disadvantage is<n>clear. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is always hope! The most elite<n>of elites is
here beside me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, onward! Onward, Trainer! You<n>are the last
piece afforded to me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We shall infiltrate and mercilessly<n>douse them
with sea water whilst<n>chanting, "Water the
flowers! Water<n>the Grass!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Dash...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Agh, Trainer?! Where do you think<n>you are off to?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get out of there as fast as my legs<n>can carry me.
Being at Opera O's<n>mercy all summer could be the
death<n>of me.
